title: About
body:
I'm Pavel Trnka, a product designer with 20 years in UI/UX — PWAs, B2B platforms, design systems, shipped into real production, not just in a portfolio deck.

I design and see things through into production myself, rather than handing off a Figma file and moving on. Most of my recent work has been on guest-facing and admin flows for hospitality and subscription platforms — the kind of software where a bad form costs someone real time and money, not just frustration.

I use AI deliberately in the process — to move faster on iteration and exploration — while keeping a clear line around which decisions deserve a human call. I'd rather write clean, well-structured CSS than lean on utility classes as the foundation of a whole system; it reads better, and it doesn't end up looking like every other AI-generated interface.

Based in Prague. Available for select freelance and contract work with teams outside the Czech Republic.
